fm26.notes: Football Manager 26 (SEGA / Sports Interactive). Cinematic wall at v0.4.1.9.

hkia.notes: Hello Kitty Island Adventure (Sunblink). Server-reachability dialog blocks main menu.

007fl.notes: 007 First Light (IO Interactive). Hits Wine cryptasn SPC page fault.

tww3.notes: Total War: WARHAMMER III (CA / Microsoft). Hits Wine SEH invalid frame from 18 VMCALL sites (CA Clockwork).

p3r.notes: Persona 3 Reload (SEGA / Atlus). UE5 + custom ATD (Denuvo-style carve-out per SOW-P §P.1). WinInet 12029 retry loop.

lir.notes: Lost In Random (EA / stress-test only, no SOW). .orig pollution from prior failed patcher run; needs full Origin client-stack emulator.

cd.notes: Crimson Desert (Pearl Abyss). BlackSpace engine + Denuvo. Steam CEG layer defeated via gbe_fork; Denuvo hypervisor bypass via DenuvOwO (RE-only on Wine).
